---
title: "CI_coverage"
author: "Suryadyuti Baral"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(pracma)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(parallel)
library(fda)
begin = Sys.time()
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/ldm.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/kerFctn.R")
source("~/FDA_with_accelerated_longitudinal_designs/Rfunctions.R")
seedid = 42
n_subj = 100
n_tp = 2
data_gen = "homogeneous"

age <- 0:19
tfine <-  seq(0, 19, length.out = 240)
method <- "normal"
rep_cond <- 4

set.seed(seedid)
if (data_gen == "homogeneous") {
  sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = 0.1)
} else if (data_gen == "heterogeneous") {
  sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = 0.1, sd_L = 5, sd_a = 5)
} else if (data_gen == "functional_heterogeneous") {
  sim_data <- simulate_exponential_decay(n_subjects = n_subj, x = tfine, noise = 0.1, subgrp = 0.5)
} else {
  stop("Unknown data_gen type: must be 'homogeneous', 'heterogeneous', or 'functional_heterogeneous'")
}

matplot(sim_data$x, sim_data$trajectories[, 1:n_subj], type = "l", lty = 1,
        ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Exponential Decay Trajectories")

```

```{r}
sim_al_data <- simulate_accelerated_longitudinal(Y_full = sim_data$trajectories, n_time_points = n_tp)

# Plot sparse trajectories
matplot(sim_al_data$x_full, sim_al_data$Y_full, type = "l", lty = 2,
        col = "gray", ylab = "y", xlab = "Time", main = "Accelerated Longitudinal Sampling")
for (i in 1:n_subj) {
  points(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i, pch = 16)
  lines(sim_al_data$Lt[[i]], sim_al_data$Ly[[i]], col = i)
}

```
```{r}
set.seed(123)
sampled_subj <- 1:n_subj

reps <- 50
sub_i_evals <- vector("list", n_subj)

safe_silent <- function(expr) {
  tryCatch(
    suppressMessages(
      suppressWarnings(expr)
    ),
    error = function(e) NA
  )
}

for (i in sampled_subj) {
  
  fda_ci_pr <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(tfine), ncol = reps)
  lcs_ci_pr <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(tfine), ncol = reps)
  sampled_tp <- vector("list", reps)
  
  # keep original data intact
  y_full <- sim_data$Y_no_noise[, i]
  x_full <- sim_al_data$x_full
  
  for (j in seq_len(reps)) {
    
    # sample time points
    pos_samp <- sample(seq_len(length(x_full)), n_tp)
    
    # create a LOCAL copy (critical fix)
    sim_al_data_tmp <- sim_al_data
    sim_al_data_tmp$Ly[[i]] <- y_full[pos_samp]
    sim_al_data_tmp$Lt[[i]] <- x_full[pos_samp]
    
    sampled_tp[[j]] <- x_full[pos_samp]
    
    ## --- Initial values ---
    z02 <- if (method == "normal") {
      generate_initial_values(
        Lt_list = sim_al_data_tmp$Lt,
        Ly_list = sim_al_data_tmp$Ly,
        age_grid = age,
        m = rep_cond,
        method = "normal"
      )
    } else if (method == "replicate") {
      generate_initial_values(
        Lt_list = sim_data$Lt_true,
        Ly_list = sim_data$Ly_true,
        age_grid = age,
        m = rep_cond,
        method = "replicate"
      )
    } else {
      stop("Invalid method")
    }
    
    ## --- FDA ---
    acd_fda_2 <- safe_silent(
      ldm(sim_al_data_tmp$Ly, sim_al_data_tmp$Lt, z02, age,
          optns = list(M = nrow(z02), cores = 24, regular = FALSE))
    )
    
    results <- safe_silent(
      evaluate_simulations(tfine = tfine,
                           sim_al_data = sim_al_data_tmp,
                           sim_data = sim_data,
                           acd_fda_2 = acd_fda_2,
                           plot = FALSE)
    )
    
    for(k in 1:length(tfine)){
      if (!is.na(results)[1]) {
        
        vals <- results$Ly_sim[[i]][k, ]
        ytrue <- y_full[k]
      
        valid_vals <- is.numeric(vals) && any(is.finite(vals))
      
        if (valid_vals) {
          q <- quantile(vals, c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
          valid <- all(is.finite(q)) && is.finite(ytrue)
          fda_ci_pr[k,j] <- if (valid) {
            ytrue >= q[1] && ytrue <= q[2]
            } else FALSE
          } else {
            fda_ci_pr[k,j] <- FALSE
          }
        } else {
          fda_ci_pr[k,j] <- NA
        }

      }
        
    ## --- CT-LCS ---
    data_tmp <- convert_to_full_subject_list(sim_al_data_tmp)
    
    LCS_SSM <- safe_silent(
      run_full_kalman_simulation(data_tmp, sim_data = sim_data)
    )
    
    results2 <- safe_silent(
      evaluate_lcsssm(LCS_SSM, sim_data, sim_al_data_tmp, plot = FALSE)
    )
    
    for(k in 1:length(tfine)){
      
      if (!is.na(LCS_SSM)[1]) {
        evals_at_t <- LCS_SSM[[i]][k, ]
  
        lower <- evals_at_t$CI_lower
        upper <- evals_at_t$CI_upper
        ytrue <- evals_at_t$y_true
  
        # check validity
        valid <- is.numeric(lower) && is.numeric(upper) && is.numeric(ytrue) &&
                 is.finite(lower) && is.finite(upper) && is.finite(ytrue)
  
        if (valid) {
          lcs_ci_pr[k,j] <- (ytrue >= lower) && (ytrue <= upper)
          } else {
            lcs_ci_pr[k,j] <- FALSE
          }
        } else {
          lcs_ci_pr[k,j] <- NA
        }
    }

  }
  
  sub_i_evals[[i]] <- list(
    fda_ci_pr = fda_ci_pr,
    lcs_ci_pr = lcs_ci_pr,
    sampled_tp = I(sampled_tp)
  )
  
  message("Done: ", i)
}

```
```{r}
saveRDS(sub_i_evals, "coverage_homogeneous.rds")
sub_i_evals <- readRDS("coverage_homogeneous.rds")
```

```{r}
end <- Sys.time()
end - begin
```
